name: Ocho Old Fashioned
title: Ocho Old Fashioned Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Ocho Old Fashioned | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A rum-based twist on the classic Old Fashioned made with BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho, simple syrup, and Angostura bitters.
marketing_description: A twist on an old favorite, this cocktail swaps whisky for BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho to bring a smooth Caribbean character to the classic.

steps: Pour all ingredients into a rocks glass.
Stir until well mixed and very cold.
Garnish with an orange peel twist.

raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Ocho Old Fashioned 50 ml BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho rum 6.25 ml simple syrup 2 dashes Angostura® bitters Step 1 Pour Add all ingredients into a rocks glass. Step 2 Chill Fill with ice. Step 3 Stir Stir until well mixed and very cold. Step 4 Garnish Garnish with an orange peel twist.
